---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Something is broken or not working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages if any.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, paste error logs or screenshots.

## Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Python**: [e.g. 3.11.5]
- **Ollama**: [e.g. 0.3.14]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 130, Firefox 133]
- **Pipeline Version**: [e.g. 2.0.0]

## Additional Context
Any other information that might be helpful.
